description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress jobs when the reference changes. It should have two jobs, linux and windows, each with a strategy matrix. The linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a debian image, installs dependencies, checks out the code, and performs a series of steps including checking a toml header, configuring meson, building, and testing. The windows job runs on a windows-2022 environment, installs dependencies, checks out the code with submodules, sets up the MSVC dev environment, and performs similar steps to the linux job.
